subcodes.first_line: God willing, through the bounties of the one true Lord, mayest thou remain sound and steadfast, watchful and eloquent, ever devoted to that which He loveth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بعنایت خداوند یکتا سالم و قائم و ناظر و ناطق باشی و بما یحبه و
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort
